heading: Removal of officer: action by Secretary upon recommendation of board of inquiry
label: 1184 Removal of officer: action by Secretary upon recommendation of board of inquiry
text: The Secretary of the military department concerned may remove an officer from active duty if the removal of such officer from active duty is recommended by a board of inquiry convened under .section 1182 of this title
notes: Amendments1998— substituted “inquiry” for “review” in section catchline and “board of inquiry convened under ” for “board of review convened under ” in text.Pub. L. 105–261section 1182 of this titlesection 1183 of this title
